transcription.text: this place is absolutely exquisite i know we're departing soon but i feel like i've arrived to true tea speaking of arrivals two-time u.s paralympian danny aravich enters the delta one lounge look at that effortless drive truly a recipe for success the performance here today has just been next level you know i can see you right first scotland now milan you know i'm bringing my kilt
